# 2026-05-09 — Cedar Marsh

Overcast, still. The [Cedar Marsh Boardwalk](../trails/cedar-marsh.md) was
almost empty.

## Seen

- [Great Blue Heron](../species/birds/great-blue-heron.md) — standing motionless
  at the far channel for the better part of an hour.
- [Barred Owl](../species/birds/barred-owl.md) — *heard only*, the classic
  eight-note call from the cedars around midday. Unusual for the hour.

## Notes

Forgot the spare battery again — see the [checklist](../gear/checklist.md).
